Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xF200 "CYBERNOIDII-F200" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cybernoid II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the $00 at $7B44 to $01 to default to joystick control. 2. Patched the JSR $2340 instruction at $5A22 to be JSR $0470 instead. 3. Added a small routine at $0470 which calls the subroutine at $2340 to check for keyboard input. It then checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if 1 is pressed and start the game.
